improvements.title: Stronger mineral floating penalties
improvements.description: Added mineral-floating-moderate penalty at 500+ minerals (-0.01). Strengthened 1000+ penalty from -0.02 to -0.04, and 2000+ from -0.04 to -0.06.

improvements.title: Lower passive defense thresholds + defend-too-long penalties
improvements.description: Lowered passive-army-idle threshold from army>=40 to army>=20. Added defend-too-long (-0.03 after 8min) and defend-with-army (-0.02 with army>=15 after 6min) penalties.

improvements.title: Batch guard: prevent concurrent game launches
improvements.description: Added port check in _run_batch to abort if API server/daemon is already running on the same port.

improvements.title: Fix total_reward=0.0 in batch mode
improvements.description: Replaced hardcoded total_reward=0.0 with RewardCalculator.episode_total. Added episode_total accumulator to RewardCalculator.

improvements.title: Strengthen gateway scaling incentives
improvements.description: Strengthened gateway-scaling-6 reward from +0.005 to +0.015. Added too-few-gateways-5 penalty. Note: had no observable effect — gateway count is hardcoded in rule-based strategy.

improvements.title: Mineral-float gateway scaling
improvements.description: Added dynamic gateway scaling in macro_manager.py: when minerals > 500, the bot adds extra gateways (1 per 500 floating minerals, capped at 12). This bypasses the hardcoded GATEWAY_PER_BASE limit.
